## PiWs.listen() method

Starts listening and returns a handle for the running server.

**Signature:**

```typescript
listen(options?: PiWsListenOptions): Promise<RunningServer>;
```

## Parameters

<table><thead><tr><th>

Parameter

</th><th>

Type

</th><th>

Description

</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

options

</td><td>

[PiWsListenOptions](./pi-ws.piwslistenoptions.md)

</td><td>

_(Optional)_ Optional host or port overrides for this listen call.

</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

Promise&lt;[RunningServer](./pi-ws.runningserver.md)<!-- -->&gt;

Running server handle.

## Remarks

Repeated calls return the same running server instance until `close()` is called.
